items.title: This Is What Nvidia Says Could Be the Next Big Trend in Artificial Intelligence. These 3 Stocks Could Be Big Winners
items.author: David Jagielski
items.description: Nvidia CEO believes AI agents will be deployed at significant scale this year, opening up growth opportunities for Microsoft, Salesforce, and ServiceNow. These companies are already offering AI agent capabilities to their customers.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Microsoft has already launched its AI assistant Copilot, which is available in popular office applications. The company's AI business is expected to surpass $10 billion in annual revenue, indicating strong growth potential.

Salesforce's Agentforce can help provide support to employees and customers, and the company allows users to create their own agents. However, the company's sales growth remains in the single digits, and the stock is trading at a high valuation.

ServiceNow's AI agents can help collaborate and solve problems across a company's entire operations. The company is growing at a fast rate of more than 20%, and the CEO sees a huge opportunity in AI agents, despite the stock's high valuation.

items.title: Clickstream Analytics Market Projected to Exceed USD 1.71 Billion by 2025 | Straits Research
items.author: N/A
items.description: The global clickstream analytics market is projected to grow from $1.71 billion in 2025 to $4.84 billion by 2033, driven by the rise of e-commerce and the trend of predictive marketing. North America and Europe are expected to be the key regional markets.

items.title: Should You Buy Microsoft Stock Before Jan. 29?
items.author: Parkev Tatevosian, Cfa
items.description: Microsoft is expected to provide an update on its artificial intelligence (AI) ambitions. The article discusses the company's potential AI developments and their impact on investors.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article suggests that Microsoft will likely provide investors with an update on its AI ambitions, indicating the company's focus on and potential advancements in this technology, which could be seen as a positive development for investors.

items.title: Telecom Analytics Market Analysis, 2025-2030: Revenues Reached $7.07 Billion in 2024, and are Forecast to Cross $16.2 Billion by 2030
items.author: Na
items.description: The global telecom analytics market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 14.9% from 2025 to 2030, reaching $16.21 billion by 2030. The Asia-Pacific region is expected to see the highest growth, driven by increasing investments in advanced technologies like IoT and Big Data.
